title: Lesson 1112: 体力, 対話, 絶える...

items.gloss: stamina; endurance; physical strength; resilience; resistance to disease; strength of an organization (e.g. profitability, productivity, economic clout, stability, growth potential)
to die out; to peter out; to become extinct; to cease; to be stopped; to be discontinued; to be cut off
quantity; amount; volume; number; amount of money
to rise; to swell; to be promoted
open-air fire (e.g. for garden refuse); bonfire; open fire (e.g. in a kitchen)
burly; strong; sturdy; indomitable; indefatigable; strong-willed; resolute; bold; robust (vitality, appetite, economic growth, etc.)
